description:
Support multiple named configuration profiles with per-app auto-switching and manual override.

A profile defines cursor/scroll speeds, deadzone, button mappings, etc. The default profile is the fallback. Other profiles can be bound to specific app bundle IDs, activating automatically when that app is frontmost.

Manual override: pressing Menu+Options forces the default profile until the combo is pressed again, which re-enables auto-switching.

```mermaid
graph LR
    1[Profile data model] --> 2[Profile persistence]
    2 --> 3[Per-app profile activation]
    2 --> 4[Settings UI for profiles]
    3 --> 5[Manual override combo]
```
title: Configuration profiles
